methods.name: Multiply
methods.description: Multiply two IEEE-754 floats (DR0 × DR1) and return the product in DR0.

methods.name: Divide
methods.description: Divide DR0 by DR1 (DR0 ÷ DR1) and return the quotient in DR0. FAULT if DR1 is zero.

methods.name: Sqrt
methods.description: Return the square root of DR0 (√DR0). Input must be non-negative.

methods.name: Mod
methods.description: Return the IEEE-754 remainder of DR0 ÷ DR1 (equivalent to fmod).

methods.name: Sin
methods.description: Return the sine of DR0 (radians) in DR0.

methods.name: Cos
methods.description: Return the cosine of DR0 (radians) in DR0.

methods.name: Tan
methods.description: Return the tangent of DR0 (radians) in DR0.

methods.name: Asin
methods.description: Return the arcsine of DR0 in radians. Input must be in [−1, 1].

methods.name: Acos
methods.description: Return the arccosine of DR0 in radians. Input must be in [−1, 1].

methods.name: Atan
methods.description: Return the arctangent of DR0 in radians.

methods.name: ToDegrees
methods.description: Convert DR0 from radians to degrees (DR0 × 180/π).

methods.name: ToRadians
methods.description: Convert DR0 from degrees to radians (DR0 × π/180).

methods.name: Bernoulli
methods.description: Return the Bernoulli number B(n) for non-negative integer n in DR0.

methods.name: Abs
methods.description: Return the absolute value of DR0 (|DR0|).

methods.name: Pow
methods.description: Return DR0 raised to the power DR1 (DR0^DR1).

methods.name: Min
methods.description: Return the smaller of DR0 and DR1.

methods.name: Max
methods.description: Return the larger of DR0 and DR1.

methods.name: GCD
methods.description: Return the greatest common divisor of integer DR0 and DR1 using the Euclidean algorithm.

methods.name: Factorial
methods.description: Return n! for non-negative integer n in DR0. Returns 1.0 for n=0.

methods.name: Log2
methods.description: Return the base-2 logarithm of DR0 (log₂ DR0). Input must be positive.

methods.name: Atan2
methods.description: Return the two-argument arctangent atan2(DR0, DR1) in radians. DR0=y, DR1=x.

methods.name: Signum
methods.description: Return the sign of DR0: +1.0 if positive, −1.0 if negative, 0.0 if zero.
